server-port.label: Server Port
server-port.description: The port the server listens on

server-ip.label: Server IP
server-ip.description: Bind the server to a specific IP. Strongly recommended to leave this property empty!

query.port.label: Query Port
query.port.description: Set the port for the server listener (see enable-query)

max-build-height.label: Max Build Height
max-build-height.description: Maximum height players can build in the game

max-world-size.label: Max World Size
max-world-size.description: Set the maximum radius for the world border, in blocks

max-players.label: Max Players
max-players.description: Maximum number of players allowed simultaneously

online-mode.label: Online Mode
online-mode.description: Whether to verify players' Minecraft accounts

level-seed.label: World Seed
level-seed.description: Seed used to generate the world

generator-settings.label: Generator Settings
generator-settings.description: Settings used to customize world generation. See superflat and customized for proper settings and examples

allow-nether.label: Allow Nether
allow-nether.description: Allow players to enter the Nether

gamemode.label: Default Game Mode
gamemode.description: Default game mode for new players

force-gamemode.label: Force Game Mode
force-gamemode.description: Force players to use the default game mode

hardcore.label: Hardcore Mode
hardcore.description: If set to true, the server difficulty setting is ignored and set to hard, and players will be set to spectator mode upon death

player-idle-timeout.label: Player Idle Timeout
player-idle-timeout.description: If not 0, players will be kicked from the server if they are idle for more than that many minutes

function-permission-level.label: Function Permission Level
function-permission-level.description: Sets the default permission level for functions

op-permission-level.label: OP Permission Level
op-permission-level.description: Sets the permission level for OPs when using the /op command

pvp.label: Player vs Player (PvP)
pvp.description: Whether to allow players to attack each other

allow-flight.label: Allow Flight
allow-flight.description: Allow players to fly in survival mode if they have a mod that adds flight. Allowing flight may make griefers more common, as it will make their job easier. Has no effect in creative mode. false - Flight is not allowed. Players flying for more than 5 seconds will be kicked. true - Flight is allowed. Players can use any flight-enabling mod to fly.

broadcast-console-to-ops.label: Broadcast Console to OPs
broadcast-console-to-ops.description: Send output of executed commands to all online OPs

broadcast-rcon-to-ops.label: Broadcast RCON to OPs
broadcast-rcon-to-ops.description: Send output of commands executed via RCON to all online OPs

prevent-proxy-connections.label: Prevent Proxy Connections
prevent-proxy-connections.description: If the ISP/AS sent by the server is different from Mojang's authentication server, players will be kicked

entity-broadcast-range-percentage.label: Entity Broadcast Range
entity-broadcast-range-percentage.description: This option controls how close entities need to be to players before data packets are sent to clients

rate-limit.label: Rate Limit
rate-limit.description: Sets the number of packets a player can send before being kicked from the server

view-distance.label: View Distance
view-distance.description: Number of chunks sent to clients by the server

simulation-distance.label: Simulation Distance
simulation-distance.description: Chunk distance simulated by the server

max-tick-time.label: Max Tick Time
max-tick-time.description: Maximum time (milliseconds) the server waits for a tick

max-chained-neighbor-updates.label: Max Chained Neighbor Updates
max-chained-neighbor-updates.description: Limits the number of chained NC updates; chained NC updates exceeding this number will be skipped

sync-chunk-writes.label: Sync Chunk Writes
sync-chunk-writes.description: When enabled, chunk files are written in synchronous mode

enforce-secure-profile.label: Enforce Secure Profile
enforce-secure-profile.description: Whether to force players to use secure profiles

enable-query.label: Enable Query
enable-query.description: Allow server listener using GameSpy4 protocol. Used to get server information

enable-status.label: Enable Status
enable-status.description: Makes the server appear as "online" on the server list

enable-jmx-monitoring.label: Enable JMX Monitoring
enable-jmx-monitoring.description: Exposes an MBean with object name net.minecraft.server:type=Server and two attributes averageTickTime and tickTimes for exposing tick times in milliseconds

enforce-whitelist.label: Enforce Whitelist
enforce-whitelist.description: Enforce the whitelist on the server. When enabled, users not on the whitelist will be kicked from the server after the server reloads the whitelist file

log-ips.label: Log IP Addresses
log-ips.description: Whether to log players' IP addresses in server logs when they join the game

hide-online-players.label: Hide Online Players
hide-online-players.description: If set to true, the server will not return the online player list when responding to client status requests

require-resource-pack.label: Require Resource Pack
require-resource-pack.description: When this option is enabled, players will be prompted to make a choice (whether to enable the server resource pack). Players who refuse will be disconnected from the server

resource-pack.label: Resource Pack URI
resource-pack.description: Optional option, can enter a URI pointing to a resource pack. Players can choose whether to use this resource pack

resource-pack-prompt.label: Resource Pack Prompt
resource-pack-prompt.description: Optional, used to display custom information on the resource pack prompt interface when using require-resource-pack

resource-pack-sha1.label: Resource Pack SHA1
resource-pack-sha1.description: SHA-1 value of the resource pack, must be lowercase hexadecimal, recommended to fill it

enable-command-block.label: Enable Command Block
enable-command-block.description: Whether to allow the use of command blocks

generate-structures.label: Generate Structures
generate-structures.description: Whether to generate villages, dungeons, and other structures

use-native-transport.label: Use Native Transport
use-native-transport.description: Whether to use native transport (Linux only)

network-compression-threshold.label: Network Compression Threshold
network-compression-threshold.description: Size threshold for network packet compression

initial-disabled-packs.label: Initially Disabled Packs
initial-disabled-packs.description: Names of data packs that need to be disabled during world creation, comma separated

initial-enabled-packs.label: Initially Enabled Packs
initial-enabled-packs.description: Names of data packs that need to be enabled during world creation, comma separated

text-filtering-config.label: Text Filtering Config
text-filtering-config.description: Text that needs to be filtered in the server
